vibe: Sophisticated, authoritative, cinematic, modern data-driven. Moving away from standard SaaS flat dark mode to a rich 'deep space/aubergine' aesthetic.

typography.strategy: High contrast between geometric headings (Outfit) and highly legible geometric humanist body (Manrope). No Inter. Headings must have tracking-tight.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Control Room Grid (Dense but breathing). Using p-6 to p-8 padding on all main containers. Strict asymmetrical emphasis.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4. Gap-6. KPIs span 1 col each. Main charts span 2 or 3 cols. Feed/lists span 1 col.
spacing_and_layout.surface_treatment: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl on headers and floating elements. 1px inner borders (border-white/10) to separate glass from background. Flat background for data widgets to prevent refraction distortion.

components.cards: Avoid standard fully rounded Shadcn cards. Use minimal 4px to 8px max border radius. 1px solid subtle border. Flat solid backgrounds.
components.buttons: Flat design with soft glow on hover. No gradients on buttons. Primary buttons use #8B5CF6.
components.forms: Use Shadcn components heavily customized for .jsx. Input fields must have solid dark background (#0A0510) and purple-tinted borders.
components.tables: Edge-to-edge minimalist tables. Hover states on rows should highlight with very subtle #8B5CF6 (opacity 5%).

data_visualization.styling: Remove all chart axis lines, use dotted grid lines only on Y axis (stroke='rgba(255,255,255,0.05)'). Tooltips must use Glassmorphism style with backdrop-blur. Use gradient fills for area charts ending in 0 opacity.
data_visualization.radar_chart: Use primary purple (#8B5CF6) for student metrics vs average (#A79FC4).
data_visualization.bar_chart: Use rounded top corners for bars (radius=[4, 4, 0, 0]).

motion.hover: Subtle translation (-translate-y-0.5) and shadow-lg with purple tint on cards.
motion.page_transition: Simple fade in. Use framer-motion for staggering list items in the students table.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use Outfit for headings and Manrope for body text via Google Fonts.
Do not use generic Shadcn borders. Override Tailwind's border-border to be rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.15) globally in tailwind config.
Ensure the application strictly uses .js/.jsx files as typescript is not used.
Include 'data-testid' on all buttons, forms, inputs, and major interactables.

For the dashboard background, use a CSS radial gradient overlay to create a subtle glow: bg-[radial-gradient(ellipse_at_top_right,_var(--tw-gradient-stops))] from-purple-900/20 via-[#0A0510] to-[#0A0510].
Ensure Recharts uses the specified color palette for variables instead of default colors, specifically avoiding standard blue/gray.
Build the dashboard using the 'Control Room Grid' with accurate mobile-first responsive adjustments.
